name: Colormeleons
short_description: A painting meleon without any talent - and a talent without money. Help your meleon-artist to satisfy his need for recognition in this ultimate Idle-Painting-game where everything is about being part of a great community to reach your goals together with other players to become a famous painter!
detailed_description:
Colormeleons is the newest Idle-Painting-Community-Experience on Steam. Help your Colormeleon to satisfy his need for recongnition by taking part in the weekly painting contests within the Steam-community.

Try to become the best painter on Steam! Paint wonderful pictures with your limited paint, try to get more paint for ilding and trading and publish your pictures as screenshots to become the most famous painter.
Everyone who posts his artwork on the Steam-community-hub takes part in the competition an gets the chance to make his art part of the game visible for all other players.




Hardcore community experience: Foreign players will own unique and rare painting materials to make pictures even greater. But what are you able to offer?
New challenges every week!
Be part of the greatest community steam has ever seen!

How to play:

Every player will get his very own vain Colormeleon in a specific color. Your Colormeleon will support you with all you need to paint: A great studio, canvas, painting ideas, color. But – and this is the problem you have to solve – only very few colors, very few canvases and only shades of the color of your colormeleon.
So, you will have to go out, meet the community and try the better trader and betterr painter to become most famous Colormeleon-player Steam has ever seen!
